narrative:
Precinct Rootstown A (precinct in Portage County) has 1,106 registered voters, with 53.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 24.5%, a modest Democratic lean of 2.8 percentage points.
